calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Silverman for Channing Thomas.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). The Court directed Mr. Silverman to serve the order on Mr. Hollund as well as any other notices he'd be entitled to.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
